title: Common Shop Stock Lists for the Army's Ground Brigade Combat Teams
description: The authors suggested improvements to the process to update the shop stock list maintained by the Army's brigade combat teams to enhance battlefield performance and mobility and reduce the workload required to reconfigure storage locations.
